visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a female host standing in a brightly lit retail environment. She has long dark hair and wears a light blue dress with a white floral pattern and a sheer overlay. She stands in front of wooden shelves packed with colorful boxes of food products, predominantly red, orange, and green. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a studio or well-lit shopping mall. She gestures with her hands towards the products as she speaks. (2) The camera transitions to a series of close-up shots of specific food items. A hand is seen holding a clear plastic bowl containing noodles, beef chunks, and vegetables. Behind it, several cardboard boxes with cartoon illustrations of animals and food are visible. The textures of the noodles and the glossy finish of the packaging are clearly highlighted. (3) The host is shown holding a large, colorful gift box with a red handle. The box features vibrant illustrations of traditional stage scenes with various characters. She turns the box to show its different sides. The background remains the bustling retail space with other customers and staff wearing face masks. (4) The camera pans across more shelves containing snacks like rice crackers and popcorn in colorful bags. The host points to a menu board displaying various food options and prices. A close-up shot shows a round, golden-brown egg cake with a smiley face logo being lifted from a mold. (5) The final segment shows the host near a checkout or packing area, placing items into a blue basket. Other shoppers are seen in the background, including a person with long hair and a brown bag. The atmosphere is busy and energetic, with constant movement around the product displays.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我們滿滿的食物專區. [Logo]: hahababy. (2) [Subtitle]: 過年快到了. (3) [Subtitle]: 想要補一些食物在家的話. (4) [Subtitle]: 這裡都可以直接來拿. (5) [Subtitle]: 那咖哩飯有. (6) [Subtitle]: 兩入的跟六入的. (7) [Subtitle]: 再來的話呢. (8) [Subtitle]: 就是我們的紅燒牛肉麵. (9) [Subtitle]: 這幾天聽說賣得非常好. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後再來羊肉爐. (11) [Subtitle]: 清燉. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後紅燒. (13) [Subtitle]: 或者或者是你要綜合的. (14) [Subtitle]: 就是你不要麵. (15) [Subtitle]: 你只要那個爐就好了. (16) [Subtitle]: 這邊有. (17) [Subtitle]: 都有. (18) [Subtitle]: 各種口味都有. (19) [Subtitle]: 吃完東西之後. (20) [Subtitle]: 需要的那個酵素凍. (21) [Subtitle]: 然後或是女生. (22) [Subtitle]: 每天都要補的那個蔓越莓. (23) [Subtitle]: 這邊有. [Variety]: ✦ 提供試吃 ✦. (24) [Subtitle]: 新年禮盒. (25) [Subtitle]: 實體在這裡. (26) [Subtitle]: 你來. (27) [Subtitle]: 你想要趕著去送人的話. (28) [Subtitle]: 你來這邊可以直接拿回家. (29) [Subtitle]: 然後也可以看到他. (30) [Subtitle]: 實體本人長什麼樣子. (31) [Subtitle]: 米餅. (32) [Subtitle]: 哈米花. (33) [Subtitle]: 然後脆米滋. (34) [Subtitle]: 脆米滋我看他們現場. (35) [Subtitle]: 也有開試吃給大家吃. (36) [Subtitle]: 他就是算新品. (37) [Subtitle]: 沒吃過想要來吃吃看的都有. (38) [Subtitle]: 那爆米花. (39) [Subtitle]: 蒟蒻. (40) [Subtitle]: 吸凍. (41) [Subtitle]: 吸凍應該是最後囉. (42) [Subtitle]: 最後的吸凍了. (43) [Subtitle]: 再來的話就是. (44) [Subtitle]: 你沒有吃過我們家食物. (45) [Subtitle]: 你想要先吃吃看再買的話. (46) [Subtitle]: 我們這邊也有提供. (47) [Subtitle]: 單個單個的販售. (48) [Subtitle]: 你就吃吃看. (49) [Subtitle]: 喜歡的話你再買整盒的回家. (50) [Subtitle]: 也不用怕踩雷. [Slogan]: hahababy.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main host, 1 female staff member in background, 1 female customer, 1 male staff/customer in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female host with long black hair, wearing a light blue and white floral patterned long dress with a transparent mesh overlay.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A retail booth filled with numerous shelves of packaged food. The shelves are light-colored wood. The walls are decorated with brand logos like 'hahababy' and cartoon illustrations. In the background, there are other mall structures like signage for MUJI and escalator areas.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal female voice speaking rapidly in Mandarin. The background music is an upbeat, major-key electronic pop track with a consistent 4/4 beat at approximately 128 BPM. The vocal is prominent in the mix, with clear articulation and an energetic, friendly tone. (2) As the video cuts to food close-ups, subtle incidental noises of plastic rustling and light metallic clinking can be heard, suggesting the handling of food packaging and utensils. The BGM continues uninterrupted, maintaining the fast-paced energy. (3) A distinct 'whoosh' transition sound effect occurs during a scene cut, marking a change in visual focus. The speaker's pitch varies significantly, reflecting excitement as she describes the popular products. (4) Towards the end, the sound of a mechanical click or latch is heard as an egg cake is removed from its mold. Ambient mall noise—a distant murmur of other people and commercial music—is slightly audible in the gaps between the speaker's phrases, providing environmental context. The overall audio remains bright and compressed for a social-media style presentation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Product 1 -> Product 2 -> Gift Box -> Snack Section -> Menu/Cooked Food.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional showcase for the 'hahababy' brand's food product line at a physical retail pop-up. The host systematically introduces various items, from frozen meals like beef noodles to healthy snacks and festive gift boxes, emphasizing their availability for the upcoming Lunar New Year. The intent is to drive foot traffic to the store and encourage impulse purchases through live demonstrations and product variety.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host is directly introducing and promoting the entire food range of the brand 'hahababy', including showing packaging, the physical store, and a menu.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density text and fast-cut editing style typical of short-form social media marketing in Taiwan. The combination of upbeat music and high-energy narration creates a strong 'call-to-action' atmosphere for shopping.
